options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_requirement
options.description:
0 = Stage hunt (beat/loop all stages)
1 = Kill Director (required ~75% of stages beaten)

options.name: chest_checks_per_stage
options.description:
how many chest checks per stage
from 5 to 10
default: 7

options.name: egg_inclusion
options.description:
how to include eggs:
0 = fully disabled
1 = locked behind an item
2 = fully unlocked

options.name: lock_hyper_behind_item
options.description: Lock the `Hyper` gamemode behind an item

options.name: lock_hurry_behind_item
options.description:
Lock the `Hurry` gamemode behind an item
This will lock `Beat with [character]` and `[stage] beaten` checks until hurry is found

options.name: lock_arcanas_behind_item
options.description: Lock the `Arcanas` gamemode behind an item

options.name: enemysanity
options.description: The first kill of an enemy is a check

options.name: enemysanity_arcana_enemies
options.description: Allows Arcana specific enemies to be checks for enemysanity

options.name: character_pool_size
options.description: Limit the amount of characters (select a random assortment of characters if higher)

options.name: stage_pool_size
options.description: Limit the amount of stages (select a random assortment of stages if higher)

options.name: local_items

options: Character Unlock: Mask of the Red Death
Character Unlock: Blue Crescent Moon Cornell
Character Unlock: Lolo, Hiss, Meow and Purr
